description_long: This is a double-headed axe featuring a robust, dark metallic blade on each side, both with a slightly curved cutting edge and a symmetrical design. The handle is cylindrical, crafted from wood, and wrapped with a series of leather straps for enhanced grip and comfort. The wood displays a gradient of brown tones, with the lower section appearing darker, possibly from use or intentional staining. The blade is mounted securely atop the handle, with visible fastenings suggesting a traditional wedged attachment. The overall design is utilitarian yet visually striking, suitable for both functional and display purposes. No visible markings or branding are present on the axe.
description: A double-headed axe with a dark metal blade and a wooden handle wrapped in leather straps, featuring a symmetrical and robust design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both curved blades and the full length of the leather-wrapped wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the axe and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying both blades and the handle's wrapping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the handle's round cross-section.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical wooden handle, straight, wrapped with leather straps for grip, round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical, dark metal blades with curved cutting edges and no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible fastenings.
